title: Plate Filling Heat Inactivated Covid Samples for PCR - Part 3
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol preps multiple 96 deep well plates with 600ul of saline up to the specified number of plates. All plates are fully filled with 600ul of saline. The left and right multi-channel pipettes aspirate and dispense two columns at a time. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Plates`: Specify the number of plates to fill starting from slot 4. ---
Saline is added to each well up to the number of wells psecified up to the number of plates specified starting from slot 4.
